The 5th episode of our TAL (Theater Research Laboratory) podcast series is now live!

In this episode, Betül Kızılok Bavli, who worked as a lab technician at TAL and is an actress at Istanbul City Theaters, talks about the creative processes and projects she has contributed to. You can access our podcast via the Spotify link on the @tal_arsiv profile.
